Aegis of Ice  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 25
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 WIS: +8 INT: +8
SV COLD: +50
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: CLR PAL SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Aegis of Ice
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 25
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 WIS: +8 INT: +8
SV COLD: +50
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: CLR PAL SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Shield of Kings
Item Type:Shield
Light:Stein of Tears
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 09:48:43
Page Updated:Sat Apr 20th, 2024

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Icewell Keep
NPC Name
Dain Frostreaver IV
The Fabled Dain Frostreaver IV


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Icewell Keep
Send a correction
Post Comment
Dain Drop
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2004 at 5:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780131429
464 posts
Ya know i'm 65 SK, been playing long time, killin CT, Seru, Ssra, all that jaz, and I have this, and i STILL carry around a complete set of resist gear just incase the occaision arrises. Nothing wrong with +50 CR, in fact aside from a bard song or buff, i believe this is the highest cold resist item in the game. Nothing wrong with being prepared

Sir Khuan Scorpse
65th SK of Cazic Thule

Edited, Sat Apr 3 17:53:01 2004

3,937 posts
sarnak battle shield is as good as this except in those few occasions when you are fighting a cold aoeing mob where the aoe isn't unresistable, and you aren't grouped with a bard.

▲ Page top
Aegis of Ice
QuoteReply
# Oct 18 2003 at 1:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591795339667
13 posts
Let's all be honest with ourselves, for the size of the raid, and the time it takes to clear and pull the Dain alone, this item is not worth the trouble.

Compare 50 CR which is useless post 55 (spells/songs to raise resists above 250) with having more varied resists (fire, Poison, etc.) And better stats all around.

If this IS an upgrade for anyone on the raid, more power to them, grats, but overall this item will generally rot.
▲ Page top

dain is lvl 70, and yes, this item does suck, alot.

I'd Use it
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2001 at 9:06 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247278142
Scholar
101 posts
As a cleric. Sheesh people - you act like clerics get everything? Well.. lets consider - i cast and heal a tank - mob turns on me - and slices me dead - guess what - tank dies anyway.

AC 25, and +8 wis both make it a great shield for clerics - its better than what i carry in my off-hand at level 52...

There might be better items out there - but most clerics i know don't have them...

Garon waves his Testament of V. and his Paw of O. that he's carried around for 30 levels.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 26 2001 at 7:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I think, maybe wrong but, if you have the power to kill Dain then it would probly be rolled on my the twinks most people would have camped there.
Boo!

# Sep 26 2001 at 10:15 AM Rating: Decent

I hate to point this out, but this isn't exactly worth the effort of killing the Dain. It's a CGS plus. Only worthwhile because of the cold resist.

QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 9:51 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591753880975
139 posts
As a cleric I wouldn;t even roll on this item. Vek the Sorc drops a similat shield, think one cleric and a palidin wanted. Personally think they just rolled to say they won it. Don;t get me wrong this is a nice item, just don;t think it is anything overly special. Oh btw palidins don;t even get kick, neither do SK. Kick=warrior, monk, ranger.

As a 47 Paladin, I use my 2hs Ornate Runed Blade for dmg, and when I pull a shaman(In Solb) I bust out my Sword of Skyfire + Slithias Shield for bashing. Hopefully at 49 when I get Holy Might, I wont have to do this as my 2 stuns should repop fast enough.

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 26 2001 at 3:19 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) at level 55 your kicks act like bash and will stun/interupt spell casters

QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 5:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1596385332569
3 posts
Only a Warriors kick acts as a stun 55+.

But kick still caps lower than bash, so most still carry a shield for stopping spellcasters.
